overview: A Daggerheart TTRPG character sheet web app with full SRD mechanics, trackers, dice roller, combat tracker, and party management.
features: Complete character creation wizard with all Daggerheart classes, ancestries, and communities
Interactive HP hearts, stress skulls, and hope stars trackers with sounds
3D geometric dice roller with domain-specific sounds
Spell compendium with cast animations per domain
Combat tracker with condition badges and duration tracking
Party management with campaign journal and roster PDF
Homebrew weapons, spells, and ancestry creators
Light and dark mode with dark fantasy aesthetic
